title: Performance limitations when accessing packed arrays and multidimensional unpacked arrays

features.name: multi-dimensional packed array index access
features.description: Code should include a multi-dimensional packed array accessed via index, where the total packed width exceeds 1024 bits

features.name: packed array part select via index
features.description: Code should include accessing a packed array element and assigning to a variable, triggering the inefficient %load/%part opcode sequence
